title: Damoritosh's Arena - Data Schemas
description: Schema index for AI agents. Fetch individual schemas to understand import formats for creatures, hazards, encounters, hacking sessions, starship scenes, parties, and session bundles.

schemas.name: Creatures
schemas.description: SF2e/PF2e creature stat blocks for encounter building

schemas.name: Encounters
schemas.description: Encounter definitions with creature/hazard references and XP

schemas.name: Hacking Sessions
schemas.description: SF2e hackable computer encounters with access points and countermeasures

schemas.name: Starship Templates
schemas.description: Reusable PC starship configurations — load once, drop into any scene

schemas.name: Shops
schemas.description: Saved shop snapshots with rolled inventory and shopkeeper

schemas.name: Session Bundle
schemas.description: Unified YAML/JSON bundle containing all data for a game session
